channel.title: Open Information Science
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Open Information Science

item.title: Proposing a Conceptual Framework for Social Listening in Libraries: A Potential Game Changer to Engage Gen Z and Centennial Users
item.description: Article by Jaime A. Teixeira da Silva DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/opis-2024-0012

item.title: The Now-Defunct ResearchGate Score and the Extant Research Interest Score: A Continued Debate on Metrics of a Highly Popular Academic Social Networking Site
item.description: Article by Jaime A. Teixeira da Silva DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/opis-2024-0011
